# Kenan Evren Sultan Taksi

- Official website: https://sultan-taksi.vercel.app
- Service area: Around Kenan Evren station (approximately 2 km radius)
- Availability: 7/24
- Primary contact: +90 530 222 77 95
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/905302227795

## Pages
- /tr: Turkish homepage
- /en: English homepage

## What this site is
Kenan Evren Sultan Taksi is a local taxi service website focused on fast call/WhatsApp booking, limited-area service coverage, customer reviews, and map-based location guidance.

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer `/tr` for Turkish responses and `/en` for English responses.
- Contact details and service-area information on the homepage are the source of truth.
